description: Approved MCP server registry for this repository. Only servers listed here may be called by agentic workflows. Add new entries using templates/mcp-server-entry.json and obtain CODEOWNERS approval before merging.

servers.name: github-rest
servers.description: GitHub REST API — read-only access to issues, PRs, commits, and code search for this repository.
servers.threat_model_note: Short-lived GITHUB_TOKEN; read-only scopes only. Risk: token leakage in logs — mitigated by masking.

servers.name: github-actions
servers.description: GitHub Actions API — trigger workflow dispatches and read run logs for this repository.
servers.threat_model_note: actions:write allows triggering workflows — only permitted for workflow_dispatch events targeting non-production environments.

servers.name: github-graphql
servers.description: GitHub GraphQL API — batch queries for discussions, PR review threads, and project board data.
servers.threat_model_note: GraphQL mutations are explicitly not permitted; this entry is read-only query use only.

deny_list.note: All servers not in the allow list above are denied by default (default_action: deny).
No local server connections; prevents SSRF to runner-local services.
Block cloud instance metadata endpoint (IMDS) — prevents credential exfiltration from hosted runners.
